text: Leading investors just bet $41 million that Lotus will become the best AI doctor powered by real doctors.
Imagine the power of a thousand doctors in your pocket working to protect your health
by constantly analyzing your health records, wearable data, and the latest medical research.
All ready to diagnose, prescribe, and refer.
Any time for free.
Sounds crazy right?
But let me show you.
Hi, Lotus.
I'm running low on one of my medications.
Hey, KJ.
After checking your medication history, I see it's probably your 10 milligrams of Lycinopril.
Checking the FDA drug database for interactions now.
Just a quick look at your latest labs.
Finally cross-referencing the clinical guidelines.
Okay.
Done.
I'll loop in a doctor for final sign-off.
I just got the prescription.
No appointment.
No waiting.
No bill.
This is the future.
We built this because there's a huge shortage of doctors, and the ones we do have are burning out fast.
Lotus AI makes doctors 10 times more productive by cutting out unnecessary paperwork and insurance games.
This eliminates the waste and traditional costs, enabling us to give every American free primary care.
The current system has failed us all, so join our mission to rebuild healthcare for patients and doctors.
